'''Thedit''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He<ref name="JKTCG" /> organized perimeter patrols<ref name="CCG" /> for the Jawa [[Chief/Legends|Chief]]<ref name="Who's Who">{{InsiderCite|60|Who's Who in Jabba's Palace}}</ref> [[Kalit/Legends|Kalit's]] territory. Thedit kept a watchful [[Eye/Legends|eye]] for [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragons]], [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]], and bandits working for<ref name="CCG" /> Kalit's rival,<ref name="Kalit-CCG">{{CCG|set=Jabba's Palace Limited|cardname=Kalit}}</ref> [[Wittin/Legends|Wittin]]. Thedit was an inspiring leader.<ref name="CCG" /> Even in the indigenous Jawas' simple societies, he still managed to become both a leader and an organizer.<ref name="JKTCG" /> Thedit had [[Color/Legends|yellow]] eyes.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Thedit was introduced on a card for [[November]] [[1998]]'s ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
